allow:
Bash(echo "

=== SESSION: 2025-12-26 ===
Feature #19: Monthly Revenue Report with PDF Export - COMPLETE ✅

IMPLEMENTED:
- Enhanced GET /api/revenue/monthly with weekly breakdown
- New GET /api/revenue/monthly-pdf endpoint \(Puppeteer-based\)
- MonthlyReport.tsx component with:
  - Year/month selection
  - Summary cards \(total, previous month, average weekly\)
  - Weekly breakdown bar chart
  - Weekly breakdown table
  - Category breakdown table
  - One-click PDF export
- Added route /revenue/monthly to App.tsx
- Added Monthly Report navigation to DashboardLayout

FEATURES COMPLETE: 17/50 \(34%\)

FILES:
- Created: frontend/src/components/revenue/MonthlyReport.tsx \(520 lines\)
- Created: FEATURE_19_STATUS.md
- Modified: backend/routes/revenue.js \(enhanced monthly endpoint + PDF\)
- Modified: frontend/src/App.tsx \(added route\)
- Modified: frontend/src/components/layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx \(added nav\)
- Modified: feature_list.json \(Feature #19 passes: true\)

")

Bash(echo "

=== SESSION: 2025-12-26 \(continued\) ===
Feature #20: Real-time Dashboard Updates \(WebSocket\) - COMPLETE ✅

IMPLEMENTED:
- Added revenue-update event handler to Socket.io server
- Modified /api/fees/collect-payment to emit revenue updates
- Enhanced useWebSocket hook with RevenueUpdateEvent
- Integrated real-time updates into Dashboard component
- Added visual connection indicator \(green pulse + timestamp\)

FEATURES COMPLETE: 18/50 \(36%\)

FILES:
- Created: FEATURE_20_STATUS.md
- Modified: backend/src/server.js \(added revenue event handler\)
- Modified: backend/routes/fees.js \(emit on payment collection\)
- Modified: frontend/src/hooks/useWebSocket.ts \(revenue event type\)
- Modified: frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashboard.tsx \(WebSocket integration\)
- Modified: feature_list.json \(Feature #20 passes: true\)

")
Bash(timeout 5 bash -c "curl -s http://localhost:5000/health || echo ''Backend not running''")
Bash(timeout 15 bash -c "while ! curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done; echo ''Backend started!''")

Bash(timeout 15 bash -c "npm start > /dev/null 2>&1 & echo ''Backend starting...''; sleep 10; curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/health && echo ''Backend ready!'' || echo ''Backend not responding yet''")
